base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wily_stage_4 — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 mega man 2. Wily 4 — Boobeam Trap sub-boss (crash-bombs puzzle). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
